title: PrismSanitizeOutput
description: Structured output schema for Prism Subagent A (sanitization). Reports PII, injection risk, and produces a redacted prompt.

pii_found.description: List of PII entity types detected (e.g. EMAIL, PHONE, API_KEY, SSN, NAME)

injection_risk.description: True if prompt injection phrases were detected

ambiguous_authority.description: True if the prompt contains ambiguous authority statements (persona hijacking attempts)

redacted_prompt.description: The prompt with PII replaced by [TYPE_REDACTED] tokens

issues.description: Human-readable list of all detected issues with remediation hints

safe.description: True if no blocking issues were found (pii_found empty AND injection_risk false)

rules_triggered.description: IDs of sanitization rules that fired (e.g. san-001, san-005)
